title: Ferratinium
description: Ferratinium adds in a dagger, a new armor set, and a new block pallet you can build with
body:
# Ferratinium Includes
- **Weapons:** Dagger, Sword, and Axe in the new material 
- **Armorset:** Which looks like Netherite but is simmilar to Diamond
- **Block Pallet:** A soft purple that you can build with
- **Ores:** The two ores that make the Armor, Weapons, and Block Pallet possible
